SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces

Interface GossipSenderCI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
All Known Implementing Classes:
GossipConnector, GossipSenderOutboundPort
public interface GossipSenderCI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
The component interface GossipSenderCI declares the signatures of the service called by a component playing the sender role in the gossip protocol.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-12

Author:
Jacques Malenfant

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    send(GossipMessageI[] gossipMessages)
    send a state to the receiver and get back a state from the receiver in return.

  • Method Details

    • send

      void send(GossipMessageI[] gossipMessages) throws Exception
      send a state to the receiver and get back a state from the receiver in return.

      Contract

       pre    gossipMessages != null && gossipMessages.length > 0
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      gossipMessages - gossip messages sent by the sender in the gossip protocol.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
